title: Civil War I: Crossing the Rubicon

translation.text: Caesar arrived at the river Rubicon, which formed the boundary of his province. There he hesitated for a while. Then he said: 'Even now we may turn back. But once we cross that little bridge, the whole issue is with the sword.' He said: 'Let us go where the omens of the gods and the wickedness of our enemies summon us. The die is cast.'
